name: SmartOnFhirV2DiscoveryAlsoAtRoot
title: SMART on FHIR v2 — discovery is ALSO discoverable at server root (informational)
description: Per SMART App Launch IG v2 §5.1, the canonical location for the SMART configuration document is `<fhir-base>/.well-known/smart-configuration` (covered by the MUST tests). Some implementations ALSO host it at the server origin (`<server-root>/.well-known/smart-configuration`) since OAuth metadata is sometimes managed at the issuer URL rather than the resource server. This test reports whether root-hosting is available — a SHOULD-level convenience for clients that probe both locations. NOT a fallback for the canonical MUST test: a server hosting only at root is non-conformant with the IG.
